title: Subscription Plan Registry
description: Validates config/plans.json — a NORMALIZED registry of subscription plans referenced by model_bank billing.plan_id. Keeping the monthly price in one place (instead of on every model entry) prevents price drift and makes each price a single, dated, sourced fact (OSINT-grade: verified_at + source_url). Recommended addition by the plan review; not in the original models_json_redesign plan.

currency.description: ISO-4217 currency code for all prices in this file (e.g. 'USD').

id.description: Stable snake_case key referenced by models_bank billing.plan_id (e.g. 'cursor_pro', 'chatgpt_plus').

price_per_period.description: Price in the file-level currency per billing_period.

metered_pool.description: Optional: describes an included usage/credit pool for metered models on this plan.

verified_at.description: Date the price was last checked against the vendor's pricing page (time-sensitive fact — re-verify periodically).

source_url.description: Official pricing page the price was read from.
